economic_notes: Nation has several controlled enterprises including Wapsewsepi Enterprises Ltd., Creeland Resources Inc., Swan River Land Corporation, Swan River Grocery Limited Partnership, Swan River Liquor Limited Partnership, and 18805424 Alberta Ltd. Agricultural Benefits Trust Fund held at RBC Wealth Management totalling $34.6M. Line of credit of $200,000 with Peace Hills Trust at prime plus 2%.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2023 (not 2024). Six entities accounted for under modified equity method (GBEs): Wapsewsepi Enterprises Ltd., Creeland Resources Inc., Swan River Land Corporation, Swan River Grocery Limited Partnership, Swan River Liquor Limited Partnership, and 18805424 Alberta Ltd. Two funds consolidated directly: Operating Fund and Trust Funds. Large Agricultural Benefits Trust Fund (~$38.8M) included in accumulated surplus. The statement of change in net financial assets shows excess of revenues over expenditures as -$1,866,714 which differs from the -$1,029,145 on the statement of financial activities; the difference relates to trust fund earnings treated separately. No schedule of remuneration provided. Education expenses_education includes Post Secondary ($776,161) and School ($2,417,685). total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + LSLIRC + Health Canada + FNDF + ISET + CMHC + GoA = 10946203+604820+2579359+640129+321826+137782+462760 = 15692879 (approximate, excludes deferred revenue netting).
